titleStmt.title: SII 4.1127: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1127. (A.R. No. 266 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
prāptayē bhīmēśāya nitāṁtamujvalaśikhaṁ śrīnaṁbirājōdiśat [.]svasti samadhigata
paṁccamahāśabdha mahāmaṇḍalēśvara kollipākāpuravarēśvara durjjayakulakumudacaṁdra ripugajamrigēṁdra
mallikāvallabha parāṁgganādurllabha vilāsavidyādhara bhōgapuraṁdara kriṣṇaveṇṇānadītīradakṣiṇaṣaṭsahasra
viṣayādīśvara vīramāhēśvara kīrttisudhākara guṇaratnākara vēṁggicālukyarājyamūlastaṁbha ripudaḷitakuṁbhikuṁbha
jayāṁgganāgrihatōraṇa mallanaga(ṁ)ndhavāraṇa nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁbuna śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara yōṁgē
ṟumārggamuna naṁbirāju śakavarṣamulu 1053 ṇḍagunēṁṭi vaiśākhapunnamayu sōmavāramu vyatīpātanimittamu
naṁdu śrīmaddākṣārāmabhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku naṁbirājuṁ beṭṭina yakhaṇḍavarttilōhadaṁḍu diviya yo 1
dīniki nācaṁdrārkkamu neyu sariyiṁccuvārugā bōlu nalvuruṁ būṁṭagā reṇḍavu naḍapuna kāṭabōla pāṇḍani vasamuna ni
ccina InupaEḍlu 50 ṇṭi ki nitya nē māna 1 likitaṁ peddanācāryyaḥ .Lines 2 to 8 are noticed and given in Epigraphia Indica, Vol. VI, p. 224.
Digital edition of SII 4.1127 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
